content.text:
**Recent English-language mentions on X (as of February 4-5, 2026) for the queried terms:**

### ClawHub
ClawHub.ai is a skill registry/marketplace for OpenClaw AI agents on Solana, enabling specialized capabilities like real-time data querying, video analysis, social graph mapping, and more via autonomous payments (x402).[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019094389637947782)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019054017205461268)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018855972144603389) Recent highlights include Teneo Protocol's specialist agent skills and Circle wallet integrations.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019094389637947782)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018855972144603389)

**Security Alert:** Multiple reports of 300-341 malicious skills (12% of total at the time) designed to trick users into downloading malware, discovered Feb 1-2. Researchers from Gen Threat Labs, Oren Yomtov (Clawdex), and others highlighted the risks, with protections from Norton/Avast and calls for platform action.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018323584834318419)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018323558746014087)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2018069143652827332)

### ClawCredit
Launched Feb 3 by @t54ai: Autonomous credit lines for OpenClaw AI agents on Solana. Agents apply for credit scores, borrow to spend on x402 services (e.g., compute, APIs) without human funding, repay to build reputation/limits. Install skill for pre-qualification.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2018686238526472220)[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2018771516029096254)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018911082736468319)

Associated memecoins/tokens pumped immediately via pump.fun/launchpads (e.g., CLAW, CLAWCREDIT, CC on Solana/Base), with bots like @bankrbot deploying contracts.[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2018705759320834183)[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2018705948748259504)[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2019013509850554746)

### Minara AI (@minara)
AI co-pilot/autopilot for crypto/U.S. stocks trading (backed by Circle). Hit $100M+ volume in first month, with Autopilot outperforming manual mode (~60% win rate, $50K profit during crash). Now live on ClawHub with skills for chat analysis, swaps, perps suggestions, prediction markets.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019054017205461268)[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2018323570250912136)[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2017655060180963812) Beginner guides circulating.[[15]](https://x.com/i/status/2019198616565608893)

### Midir Solana
No recent results found.

### Solend
Rebranded to Save Finance (@save_finance): Permissionless savings account on Solana (also Sui). Recent teaser: "Starts with S and we all love it."[[16]](https://x.com/i/status/2019198407693435180)

These cluster around Solana's AI agent economy (OpenClaw ecosystem), with hype on autonomy/credit but caution on ClawHub security. For deeper dives, check linked sites like clawhub.ai, claw.credit.[[17]](https://x.com/i/status/2019196949946081401)
